title: Pervasive .unwrap() on database operations risks panics
evidence: src/main.rs:71,93,109,204 — db.execute/prepare calls use .unwrap() instead of error propagation
suggestion: Return 500 errors via actix-web error handling instead of unwrapping

title: Silent error suppression via filter_map(|r| r.ok())
evidence: src/main.rs:104,120 — row mapping errors silently dropped in list_books
suggestion: Log or propagate row deserialization errors

title: All code in a single 482-line file
evidence: src/main.rs — handlers, models, DB init, and tests all in one file
suggestion: Split into modules (models.rs, handlers.rs, db.rs) for maintainability

title: Sync Mutex for DB access in async context
evidence: src/main.rs:4,38 — std::sync::Mutex<Connection> blocks the async runtime while holding the lock
suggestion: Use an async-aware connection pool (r2d2, deadpool-sqlite) or tokio::sync::Mutex
